channel.title: peax - Splunkbase Apps Releases
channel.description: a list of Newly/updated Splunk apps

item.title: Config Explorer - v1.8.24 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

tree filter can be configured to go at top,bottom,none.
improved right-click actions for rest editing. (be sure to set dashboard_xml_file_experimental_actions = true)
tidy the starting config file


Description:
This app provides a VS code editor interface for viewing and editing Splunk files. * Code completion and tooltip hinting for '.conf' files (by loading the Splunk '.spec' files) * Code gutter highlights if the line can be found in btool and if it is valid according to spec files * Displays the spec files relevant to your Splunk installation * Diff files * Provides a syntax-highlighted interface to btool, and allows diffing against the currently running config * Embeds the excellent Microsoft Monaco editor (Visual Studio Code) - with three themes * Provides useful developer hooks (bump, debug refresh etc) that can be customised and extended * Optional version control of all changes by committing them to a git repository before and after changes * Works on Linux and Windows (it is quite slow on Windows) By default, the app is not able to save files, but this can be enabled from the "Settings" link. As this app provides unrestricted access to Splunk files, users must have the "admin" role to see the app. Please read the warnings on the "details" page.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Number Display Viz - v1.7.12 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

No changes. version bump so that app is not archived by Splunkbase


Description:
A collection of ultra-configurable, single-statistic visualizations for Splunk. Includes the following styles: gauge, horseshoe, spinner, shapes (rectangle, hexagon, circle, ring, donut). Make dashboards come alive with animated number changes and subtle pulse animations.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Threat Hunting Essentials - v1.1.304 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Description:
Free Cyber Threat Hunting App to hunt APT, Threat Actors, Malware tools, exploits, etc. It is a must-have app, which hunts for presence of advanced persistent threats (APTs), threat actors, state-sponsored attackers, malware, and exploits in your organization's assets. All detected malware, exploits, and threat actors are mapped to the MITRE ATT&CK framework, providing deep insight into potential risks. Threat Hunting Essentials detects a wide range of malware tools used by threat actors, including: 1. Backdoor. 2. Worms. 3. Ransomware. 4. Bots. 5. Trojan horses. 6. Keyloggers. 7. Rootkits. 8. Spyware. 9. Fileless malware. 10. Cryptojacking. 11. Wiper malware. 12. Adware. 14. Viruses 15. P2P-Worm 16. Internet Worms 17. Net-worm 18. Clickjacking 19. Cryptominer 20. Fileless malware You can easily configure the scan interval in the app’s settings. The real-time scan feature continuously monitors for threats in near real-time, as allowed by Splunk. Information Use: Your email address is used to improve detection logic based on your feedback. Additionally, we may notify you about app upgrades, updates, or changes to features, user agreements, or the privacy policy.
item.dc:creator: Cyber Essentials Avertpoint

item.title: Splunk MCP Server - v1.0.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

What's New (Build 1.0.2)

• Fix: Handles a race condition while creating a new secret for token encryption.
• Fix: Mirrors the structuredContent field payload to the content text field.
• Enhancement: Adds support for configuring an MCP URL using port 443.


Description:
MCP Server for Splunk Platform The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open standard and framework that enables seamless, secure, and standardized two-way communication between AI applications (like large language models) and external data sources or tools. It acts as a universal adapter allowing AI systems to access, execute, and integrate functionalities from diverse systems through a common protocol, simplifying data sharing and tool interoperability without custom coding for each integration. Splunk's Model Context Protocol (MCP) server leverages this to provide a standardized, secure, and scalable interface to connect AI assistants, agents, and other intelligent systems with data in the Splunk platform for both Enterprise & Cloud customers in beta. 🔑 Key Features - Universal Connectivity Seamlessly connects AI agents and tools to Splunk data resources in a secure and efficient manner. - Enterprise-Grade Security Includes built-in authentication, authorization, and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). - Rapid Deployment Offers a plug-and-play solution, eliminating the need for custom integrations. ⚙️ Core Capabilities - Explore the Data Navigate and interact with Splunk data effortlessly. - Discover Knowledge Objects Identify and access relevant saved searches, lookups, and other knowledge assets. - Execute Searches Run powerful Splunk queries to extract insights and drive intelligent workflows. - Leverage AI capabilities from Splunk’s AI Assistant for SPL & MLTK SPL search generation from natural language, search optimization, search explanation, retrieve MLTK models and algorithms.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: Cyera TA - v4.1.18 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Fixed build --was excluding UI files


Description:
This add-on allows Splunk admins to see audit trail and event data for the Cyera application. It also allows them to see when issues discovered by Cyera's classification and DSPM capabilities are added or updated in the platform. If users wish to see datastore and classification information in Splunk, that is also available. OCSF data models for use with CIM are available. In the latest release, all events in the platform are available, and the current Cyera API endpoints are used.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Hampton

item.title: Intel 471 Vulnerability Intelligence - v1.1.1 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • updated link handling to accommodate API changes in the link structure


Description:
Intel 471's Vulnerability Intelligence provides relevant and timely information about an adversary situation and addresses the gap in current vulnerability offerings that primarily focus on things already being exploited in the wild based on known attacks and open source information.
item.dc:creator: Intel 471 Inc.

item.title: Datadog Add-on for Splunk - v2.0.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • Added support for the following Datadog sites: US3, US5, US1-FED, AP1, AP2


Description:
Preview your Datadog metrics and stream data, now, in Splunk! This add-on let user fetch various System Metrics from DataDog by leveraging DataDog API with user-friendly inputs, custom time-range, and better extensibility. Check details tab for more info.
item.dc:creator: Splunk Works

item.title: FalconSearch - v2.5.23 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

[version 2.5.23] - 03-05-2026

  • Updated Detections to correspond to ESCU 2.23


Description:
FalconSearch is a Splunk app designed to revolutionize your approach to Enterprise Security. By leveraging advanced base searching techniques, FalconSearch optimizes search times and resource usage, delivering lightning-fast results with reduced overhead. This app integrates seamlessly with your existing Splunk environment, enhancing your cybersecurity operations without sacrificing performance.
item.dc:creator: Splunk Works

item.title: Add-on for WorkspaceOne - v2.0.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

minor fixes


Description:
Collects workspaceone audit logs
item.dc:creator: Rotimi Akinbobola

item.title: Trinity Cyber - v2.8.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • Adds "passive" flag and DTLS protocol fields.
  • Upgrade to add-on-builder 4.5.1.


Description:
The Trinity Cyber Add-on provides a modular input to poll events from the Trinity Cyber Customer Portal and index them into Splunk.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Cyber Inc

item.title: Cyberint Alerts - v1.0.3 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: SOAR


Release Notes:

  • Add fetch types, severity, status, include CSV attachments, page size parameters for the "get enriched alerts" action


Description:
Cyberint and Splunk SOAR integration is here to simplify and streamline alerts for Splunk SOAR, bring enriched threat intelligence from the Argos Edge™ Digital Risk Protection Platform into Splunk SOAR and automatically implement playbooks and incident processes.
item.dc:creator: srv-prod-splnkb-papp

item.title: Cyware Intel Exchange - v4.0.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

This release introduces major enhancements to Cyware Intel Exchange. The following updates streamline indicator management and improve operational efficiency:
1. Manage multiple Cyware instances with new multi-account support.
2. Use KV Store–based data collection as the default ingestion method, with index ingestion now available as an optional configuration.
3. Correlate indicators using field-based matching to identify sightings in Splunk events.
4. Configure data inputs with the new Lookback Days parameter.
5. Fetch enriched indicator data directly from Cyware Threat Intelligence eXchange.
6. Automate indicator lifecycle management by creating indicators, updating status, and managing allowlists, tags, tasks, and notes from within Splunk.
7. Ingest indicators in bulk from Splunk indexes, data models, and lookups with automation support.
8. Automatically delete expired indicators from KV Store lookups.
9. Monitor activity using the new Indicator Overview and Correlation Overview dashboards.
10. Automatically migrate existing index-based data to KV Store storage.
11. Trigger new alert actions in Splunk Enterprise Security using Adaptive Response integration.
12. Experience improved error handling, enhanced proxy configuration support, and more reliable data collection.


Description:
The Cyware Intel Exchange Add-on for Splunk is used to assist the user in the integration of Cyware Intel Exchange with Splunk Enterprise. This application allows the user to perform the following tasks: 1. Seamlessly extract threat intelligence data from Cyware Intel Exchange to Splunk 2. Index and categorize threat intelligence data within Splunk for ease of access 3. Deploy an intuitive dashboard for streamlined data visualization, providing key insights into holistic IOC metrics and subcategories 4. Augment Splunk index indicators with Cyware Intel Exchange data, facilitating a layered analysis and deeper understanding of threat intelligence
item.dc:creator: Cyware Labs

item.title: Rootly App for Splunk - v1.1.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • Simplified description field behavior


Description:
The Rootly Splunk App enables faster response times to service disruptions by leveraging the power of Splunk Alerts. Rootly and Splunk customers can: - Start leveraging Splunk Alerts in Rootly with just one click. - Tailor your incident response workflows across Rootly accounts and services using a single Splunk instance. - Minimize information overload and alert noise by grouping and streamlining alerts. With Rootly and Splunk working together, your organization can achieve faster, smarter, and more efficient incident resolution.
item.dc:creator: Quentin Rousseau

item.title: VIAVI Observer Apex App - v1.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

VIAVI Observer Apex App for Splunk – Version 1.0.0 Release Notes

Welcome to the initial release of the VIAVI Observer Apex App for Splunk (v 1.0.0). This document provides a complete overview of the capabilities, integration points, and operational guidance you need to start ingesting VIAVI Observer Threat Forensics (OTF) and Network Performance data into Splunk.

Information

  • Version Number: 1.0.0
  • Company: VIAVI Solutions
  • Application Name: VIAVI Observer Apex App for Splunk

Release Information

  • Secure Event Ingestion: Dedicated REST endpoint that receives OTF events over TLS‑encrypted channels.
  • OCSF Normalization: All incoming data is mapped to the Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework (OCSF) before indexing.
  • Rich Metadata Export: Every alert carries the full suite of metadata (packet‑level details, flow records, TLS fingerprints, device identifiers, etc.) for both security and network performance monitoring.
  • Pivot to Observer Apex: Each alert contains a URL that allows a pivot back to the information dashboard, and details generating the alert for further investigatons.
  • Pre‑built Splunk Dashboards: Ready‑to‑import example dashboards for DNS Errors, User Experience Score (EUE), Interface Utilization and TLS Certificate health.
  • Automatic Alerting: Out‑of‑the‑box alert rules map OTF security events
  • API‑First Integration: Leverages the Rich VIAVI Observer API for:
    • Pulling additional metadata on demand for custom dashboard
    • Automating mitigation workflow orchestration with Splunk SOAR platform.
    • Use API and Splunk SOAR to pull all information, even to the packet data from Observer Apex platform.


Short Description:
Bring VIAVI Observer Apex alerts directly into your Splunk environment, enabling real-time visibility into critical network and security issues.


Description:
VIAVI Observer Apex App for Splunk: Turning Network Data into NetSecOps Actionable Insight. Transform your network and security monitoring data into actionable insights with the Observer Apex App for Splunk. This powerful integration brings Viavi Observer Apex alerts directly into your Splunk environment, enabling real-time visibility into critical network or security issues.
item.dc:creator: VIAVI Solutions

item.title: Hydrolix Search - v1.2.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • Added streaming query result support
  • Added hdxdescribe command for describing Hydrolix projects and table schemas
  • Added support for filtering on summary columns
  • Fixed summary column analysis for summary columns that use multiple kinds of aliases
  • Fixed summary column analysis for summary columns that depend on multi-suffix aggregate functions
  • Fixed logging


Description:
With Hydrolix Search for Splunk, you can connect Splunk to solutions that use Hydrolix's streaming data lake technology and partner solutions like TrafficPeak based on Hydrolix.
item.dc:creator: Splunk Hydrolix

item.title: Splunk ES Content Update - v5.23.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

GitHub - https://github.com/splunk/security_content/releases/tag/v5.23.0\
Splunk Docs - https://help.splunk.com/en/splunk-enterprise-security-8/security-content-update/release-notes/5.23/splunk-security-content-release-notes/whats-new\


Description:
The Splunk ES Content Update (ESCU) app delivers pre-packaged Security Content. ESCU provides regular Security Content updates to help security practitioners address ongoing time-sensitive threats, attack methods, and other security issues. Security Content consists of tactics, techniques, and methodologies that help with detection, investigation, and response. Security Content enables security teams to directly operationalize detection searches, investigative searches, and other supporting details. ESCU can generate Notable/Risk Events in Splunk Enterprise Security. Security Content also contains easy-to-read background information and guidance, for key context on motivations and risks associated with attack techniques, as well as pragmatic advice on how to combat those techniques. The analytic stories and their searches are also available at - https://github.com/splunk/security_content.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: Splunk AI Toolkit - v5.7.1 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Fixing the Connections page issue and resolved the broken docs link.
https://help.splunk.com/en/?resourceId=MLApp_User_Whatsnew


Description:
The Splunk AI Toolkit delivers new SPL commands, custom visualizations, assistants, and examples to explore a variety of ML concepts. Each assistant includes end-to-end examples with datasets, plus the ability to apply the visualizations and SPL commands to your own data. You can inspect the assistant panels and underlying code to see how it all works. AI Toolkit Quick Reference Guide: https://docs.splunk.com/images/3/3f/Splunk-MLTK-QuickRefGuide-2019-web.pdf Generative AI: With release 5.6, AI Toolkit supports Generative AI, allowing customers to integrate Large Language Models (LLMs) and Time Series Foundational Models directly into their search pipelines. Assistants: * Predict Numeric Fields (Linear Regression): e.g. predict median house values. * Predict Categorical Fields (Logistic Regression): e.g. predict customer churn. * Detect Numeric Outliers (distribution statistics): e.g. detect outliers in IT Ops data. * Detect Categorical Outliers (probabilistic measures): e.g. detect outliers in diabetes patient records. * Forecast Time Series: e.g. forecast data center growth and capacity planning. * Cluster Numeric Events: e.g. cluster business anomalies to reduce noise. Smart Assistants (new assistants with revamped UI and better ml pipeline/experiment management): * Smart Forecasting Assistant:: e.g. forecasting app logons with special days. * Smart Outlier Detection Assistant: e.g. find anomalies in supermarket purchases. * Smart Clustering Assistant: e.g. cluster houses by property descriptions. * Smart Prediction Assistant: e.g. predict vulnerabilities in firewall data.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: CCX Add-on for Juniper Products - v1.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Description:
About Us: CyberCX is Australia’s greatest force of cyber security experts. Our highly skilled professional services team operates a 24x7 on-shore security operations centre (SOC) servicing corporate and public sector organisations across Australia and New Zealand, specialising in Security Operations services leveraging Splunk. Description: The CCX Add-on for Juniper Products looks to provide a single field extraction bundle for Juniper NetScreen Firewall and Junos OS using syslog. This TA was built using a large dataset and endeavours to be the most CIM compliant comprehensive field extraction TA available for Juniper logs. Below is the listed products supported: - Juniper Junos OS - Juniper Netscreen Firewall Fully compatible with Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud, built by an Ops team for Ops teams. Features: - This TA currently supports logtypes tagged under the following CIM datamodels: Network Traffic, Authentication, Change, and Intrusion Detection (IDS). - Support available for SYSLOG ingestion. Attribution: - Full credit to the Splunk team for their work and maintenance of the foundation and components 'https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2847'
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kelly

item.title: Aviatrix Add-on for Splunk - v2.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Initial release of the Aviatrix Add-on for Splunk 2.0.0. Provides CIM-compliant field extractions and data normalization for Aviatrix Distributed Cloud Firewall logs including L4/L7 firewall, FQDN egress filtering, Suricata IDS alerts, gateway telemetry, and controller audit events. Maps to Network Traffic, Intrusion Detection, and Change Analysis CIM data models.


Short Description:
Field extractions, CIM compliance, and data normalization for Aviatrix Cloud Firewall logs in Splunk.


Description:
Technology Add-on for Aviatrix Distributed Cloud Firewall logs. Provides field extractions, CIM-compliant data normalization, and lookup tables for Aviatrix security event data including L4/L7 firewall, FQDN egress filtering, Suricata IDS alerts, gateway telemetry, and controller audit logs. Maps to Network Traffic, Intrusion Detection, and Change Analysis CIM data models. Designed to work alongside the Aviatrix Security app for dashboards and visualizations.
item.dc:creator: Chris McHenry

item.title: Aviatrix Security - v2.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Initial release of Aviatrix Security for Splunk 2.0.0. Provides six dashboards for Aviatrix Distributed Cloud Firewall visibility: Traffic Overview, Traffic Analysis, Threat Detection, Policy Enforcement, Gateway Health, and Audit Trail. Includes CIM-compliant field extractions for L4/L7 firewall, FQDN egress, IDS/Suricata, gateway telemetry, and controller audit logs.


Short Description:
Security visibility and analytics for Aviatrix Distributed Cloud Firewall. Six pre-built dashboards for traffic analysis, threat detection, policy enforcement, gateway health, and audit trail monitoring. CIM-compliant with Network Traffic, Intrusion Detection, and Change Analysis data models.


Description:
Security visibility and analytics for Aviatrix Distributed Cloud Firewall in Splunk. Provides CIM-compliant field extractions and six pre-built dashboards for SIEM/SOC teams monitoring multi-cloud network security. Dashboards included: - Security Overview: Executive security posture with KPIs, threat timeline, top blocked destinations, and gateway block rates - Traffic Analysis: L4/L7/FQDN traffic patterns, top sources/destinations, and protocol breakdown - Threat Detection: IDS alert severity, Suricata signature analysis, and source/destination correlation - Policy Enforcement: L7 policy hits, allow/deny ratios, and domain analysis - Gateway Health: CPU, memory, disk, and network throughput monitoring per gateway - Audit Trail: Controller API changes, user activity, and success/failure tracking Supported log types: - Aviatrix Cloud Firewall L4 micro-segmentation logs - Aviatrix Cloud Firewall L7 TLS/SNI inspection logs - Aviatrix Cloud Firewall IDS alerts (EVE JSON) - Gateway network and system statistics - Cloud Native Security Fabric API audit logs CIM data models supported: Network Traffic, Intrusion Detection, Change Analysis Requires the companion TA-aviatrix add-on for field extractions and CIM compliance. Logs are ingested via the Aviatrix SIEM Connector using Splunk HEC (HTTP Event Collector).
item.dc:creator: Chris McHenry

item.title: DigiCert One Add-on for Splunk - v1.0.4 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

The Splunk Add-on now supports outbound connections through proxy.


Description:
This add-on enables you to collect and ingest audit logs from DigiCert One into Splunk, providing enhanced visibility into certificate-related activities for monitoring, analysis, and compliance.
item.dc:creator: Data Elicit Solutions

item.title: Python for Scientific Computing (for Windows 64-bit) - v4.3.1 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Added  async-timeout library and upgraded the cryptography dependency to a secure version to fix a known vulnerability.


Description:
This add-on contains a Python interpreter bundled with the following scientific and machine learning libraries: numpy, scipy, pandas, scikit-learn, and statsmodels. With this add-on, you can import these powerful libraries in your own custom search commands, custom rest endpoints, modular inputs, and so forth. This add-on is available for Linux (64-bit), Windows (64-bit) and Mac. Make sure you install the appropriate one for your Splunk deployment.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform - v3.1.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Version 3.1.0 * Migrated Analytics Report Inputs. * Added compliance and inventory Reports input for Cisco Catalyst Center. * Added ISE Analytics Report input for Cisco Identity Services Engine(ISE).

Note - ISE input includes use of Paramiko library. Paramiko library includes compiled binaries that are not ARM compatible.

Version 3.0.0 * Added the dashboards visualizations for Cisco Meraki, Cisco ThousandEyes. * Introduced a new Sensors dashboard containing a centralized view for Cisco Meraki Sensors. * Rebranding of Cisco DNA Center to Cisco Catalyst Center

Version 2.0.0 * Added the dashboards visualizations for Cisco Identity Services Engine, Cisco Catalyst Center and Cisco SD-WAN product.
Modified the index macro from index= to index IN ("main").

Version 1.1.0 * Added the dashboards visualizations for Cisco Cyber Vision product.

Version 1.0.0
The App has the dashboards visualizing the data for the following products: * Cisco Identity Services Engine * Cisco SD-WAN * Cisco Catalyst Center * Cisco Cyber Vision

Added field extractions for the dashboards


Short Description:
This application provides a dashboard component to visualize data collected by the 2 Technical Add-ons: Cisco Catalyst Add-on for Splunk and Cisco Catalyst Enhanced Netflow Add-on for Splunk


Description:
Author - Cisco Systems Version - 3.1.0 Build - 1 Prerequisites - This application is dependent on the 'Cisco Catalyst Add-on for Splunk' and 'Cisco Catalyst Enhanced Netflow Add-on for Splunk' Supported Products: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Cisco Identity Services Engine Cisco Catalyst Center ThousandEyes Meraki Cyber Vision Cisco Network Infrastructure Devices which include the below platform series: * Cisco Catalyst series switches (1000, 1200, 1300, 2960, 3650, 3750, 4500, 6500, 6800, 7600, 9000 etc.) * Cisco ASR - Aggregation Services Routers (900, 1000, 5000, 9000 etc.) * Cisco ISR - Integrated Services Routers (800, 1900, 2900, 3900, 4451 etc.) * Cisco Nexus Data Center switches (1000V, 2000, 3000, 4000, 5000, 6000, 7000, 9000 etc.) * Cisco Carrier Routing System * Other Cisco IOS based devices (Metro Ethernet, Industrial Ethernet, Blade Switches, Connected Grid etc.) * Cisco Access Points * Cisco WLC - WLAN Controller
item.dc:creator: Cisco Systems, Inc.

item.title: Cisco Catalyst Add-on for Splunk - v3.1.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Version 3.1.0 * Migrated Analytics Report Inputs. * Added compliance and inventory Reports input for Cisco Catalyst Center. * Added ISE Analytics Report input for Cisco Identity Services Engine(ISE).

Note - ISE input includes use of Paramiko library. Paramiko library includes compiled binaries that are not ARM compatible.

Version 3.0.0 * Introduced a Resource Utilization Dashboard for improved monitoring. * Migrated extractions of Networks TA to support the syslogs from Cisco IOS devices. * Rebranded DNA Center to Catalyst Center. * Upgraded UCC version to v6.0.1.

Version 2.1.0 * Added Site Topology input for Catalyst Center.

Version 2.0.0 * Introduced a new, user-friendly custom interface for the Application Setup of the Add-On. * Added Client and Audit Logs inputs for Catalyst Center. * Added support for configuring Syslog inputs directly from the Add-on UI. * Added support for data collection for the following Cisco SD-WAN types: * Unified Threat Defence/Link Details * Unified Threat Defense Health * Link Health * Site/Tunnel Health * Site Health * Tunnel Health * SSE Tunnels

Added support for data collection for the following Cisco Identity Services Engine (ISE) types: * Security Group Tags * Authz Policy Hit * ISE TACACS Rule Hit * IP-SGT Bindings

Version 1.1.2 * Removed timestamp parameters from client-health and network-health endpoints for Cisco Catalyst Center. * Enhanced device-health endpoint to include data for the last 15 minutes for Cisco Catalyst Center.

Version 1.1.1 * Fixed indextime extractions for Cisco Catalyst Center.

Version 1.1.0 * Added support for the data collection of Cisco Cyber Vision.

Version 1.0.0
The Add-On supports the data collection for the following products: * Cisco Identity Services Engine * Cisco SD-WAN * Cisco Catalyst Center

Added support for the additional log sources for Cisco SD-WAN: * ACL * SGACL * Audit


Short Description:
Technical Add-on that collects Syslog, Netflow and API information from various Cisco products. The data parsed by this TA can be visualized using the Cisco Enterprise Networking application For parsing Netflow data, the Cisco Catalyst Enhanced Netflow Add-on for Splunk is needed to map the Netflow elements


Description:
Author - Cisco Systems Version - 3.1.0 Build - 1 Prerequisites - This Technical Add-on is dependent on 'Splunk Add-on for Stream Forwarders' and 'Splunk App for Stream' Supported Cisco Products: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Cisco Identity Services Engine Cisco Catalyst Center ThousandEyes Meraki Cyber Vision Cisco Network Infrastructure Devices which include the below platform series: * Cisco Catalyst series switches (1000, 1200, 1300, 2960, 3650, 3750, 4500, 6500, 6800, 7600, 9000 etc.) * Cisco ASR - Aggregation Services Routers (900, 1000, 5000, 9000 etc.) * Cisco ISR - Integrated Services Routers (800, 1900, 2900, 3900, 4451 etc.) * Cisco Nexus Data Center switches (1000V, 2000, 3000, 4000, 5000, 6000, 7000, 9000 etc.) * Cisco Carrier Routing System * Other Cisco IOS based devices (Metro Ethernet, Industrial Ethernet, Blade Switches, Connected Grid etc.) * Cisco Access Points * Cisco WLC - WLAN Controller
item.dc:creator: Cisco Systems, Inc.

item.title: BloodHound Enterprise - v1.1.3 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

New Features -
Attack Path Access: Users with read-only permissions are now immediately redirected to the Attack Path dashboard upon login.
Custom Certificate Toggle: Added a UI toggle to enable/disable custom certificate authentication.
Enhancements -
Config Streamlining: Removed persistent warning pop-ups during production configuration.
Bug Fixes -
Event Truncation: Resolved data loss issue for events exceeding 10,000 bytes.


Description:
The BloodHound Enterprise Splunk app ingests your BloodHound Enterprise data into Splunk. - Use the dashboards to track the Active Directory and Azure attack paths of your environment - Create alerts to detect when new attack paths emerge or new the exposure increases - Enrich your SIEM data with information about the attack paths to and from principals
item.dc:creator: BloodHound Enterprise Support

item.title: TrackMe - v2.3.14 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

TrackMe 2.3.14 — Policies Management & Lookup-Driven Workflows

  • Major policies management enhancement: This release introduces a significant step forward in how TrackMe manages entity governance at scale. Priority, SLA, and Tags policies now all support lookup-based matching alongside traditional regex-based rules, enabling seamless integration with external CMDB, asset inventories, and any structured data source available as a Splunk lookup (CSV or KVstore). Through a guided wizard, users can map lookup fields to entity attributes, configure value translations, and simulate policy results before applying — providing full visibility and control over policy outcomes. Regex policies are also enhanced with the ability to match against any entity field, not just the entity name. See Managing priority via policy, TrackMe Tags enrichment, and Using SLA alerting to build a 2-tier monitoring system.
  • Several bug fixes address outlier scoring accuracy, lagging class matching with variable delay policies, and AI Assistant navigation.

See: https://docs.trackme-solutions.com/latest/releasenotes.html#version-2-3-14-build-1772407097-02-03-2026


Description:
TrackMe for Splunk provides visibility and operational excellence to monitor at scale your Splunk data sources availability and quality, and many more. With a rich set of features and a powerful workflow, TrackMe empowers you day after day to get the most from your Splunk investments and deliver the five stars quality of service your users deserve. Discover TrackMe: https://trackme-solutions.com/discover Documentation: https://docs.trackme-solutions.com You can subscribe to our newsletter, and receive important communications from us. We will send notifications for instance when publishing new releases, so we can you let you know the cool and powerful things we've been working on! https://trackme-solutions.com/subscribe/ TrackMe has transitioned to a new licensing model. The Free Community Edition has been discontinued. What this means for you: - Existing licensed customers are not impacted. Your current license continues unchanged. - Community users are automatically upgraded to a Foundation Edition trial for 90 days, with full functionality enabled. After the trial period: - TrackMe remains active and fully usable for monitoring - The platform enters read-only mode You can continue to view data, dashboards, alerts, and history Creation of new tenants, trackers, or entities will be disabled To continue using TrackMe with full capabilities after the trial, a Foundation license is required. Buy Foundation Edition: https://trackme-solutions.com/get-foundation/ See all plans: https://trackme-solutions.com/pricing/
item.dc:creator: Trackme Limited

item.title: Splunk Add-on for Stream Wire Data - v8.1.6 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

https://help.splunk.com/en/splunk-cloud-platform/collect-stream-data/release-notes/8.1/release-notes/whats-new


Description:
Splunk Add-on for Stream Wire Data is part of the purpose-built wire data collection and analytics solution from Splunk along with Splunk App for Stream for data visualization and data capture management and Splunk Add-on for Stream Forwarders for data collection. The Splunk App for Stream with the Add-on for Stream Forwarder and Add-on for Stream Wire Data actively or passively capture packets, dynamically detect applications, parse protocols, and send metadata back to your Splunk environment for over 30 protocols and 300 commercial applications. Targeted full packet capture to NAS for forensic investigation of raw packets. Aggregate data using familiar SPL aggregation methods to reduce the volume of data indexed. Capture Flow-type records, including NetFlow v5, v9, jFlow, and sFlow, and IPFIX, and send Flow Records directly into your Indexers, with optional filtering and aggregation. Ingest PCAP files in real-time or on-demand. Create MD5 hashes of file attachments for Threat Intelligence correlations using Splunk ES, and extract and store those reassembled files for forensic or DLP purposes. Parse SQL statements to help understand user intent. Understand IP client-server connections with patent-pending visualization.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • Fixed some sum vs perc95 on svc reporting
  • removed SVC's by idx and st since there is no way to actually monitor this currently without pure estimations based on volume which isn't accurate


Description:
The InSitzes App for Splunk Cloud Monitoring provides administrators with actionable insights into ingestion, performance, workload, and search behavior across their Splunk Cloud environment. By consolidating system, data, and workload visibility into one app, it enables teams to proactively detect issues, optimize resource usage, and improve the overall Splunk Cloud experience.

item.title: Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on - v1.3.1 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Release Notes - Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on

Features:
This compatibility enables users to effortlessly retrieve data from both N2OS and Vantage through a single interface.
This streamlined approach simplifies the monitoring and analysis of operational network data.

Nozomi Networks is committed to enhancing the add-on based on user feedback and evolving industry requirements.

For further information, assistance, or feedback, please contact Nozomi Networks support at support@nozominetworks.com.

We hope you enjoy using the Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on and find its capabilities valuable in retrieving data from N2OS and Vantage.

The 1.1.0 improved mapping with CIM
The 1.2.0 receive alert updates and more resilient endpoint configuration
The 1.2.1 better handling of multiple requests
The 1.2.2 Fixed an issue where updated assets were not always sent correctly.
The 1.3.0 Added an optional interval-based asset update mode and updated asset event timestamp extraction to use last_activity_time
The 1.3.1 fixes a regression, the Asset continuous update mode failed when configured against a CMC


Description:
The Nozomi Networks Universal add-on for Splunk provides organizations with a unified solution to retrieve data from Sensors (Guardian), CMC (Central Management Console), and Vantage, streamlining the data collection process. This add-on seamlessly integrates with Splunk to enhance cybersecurity and operational visibility in industrial control system (ICS) and operational technology (OT) environments. The Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on works with N2OS version 24 and higher.
item.dc:creator: Nozomi Networks

Release Notes:

savedsearches.conf
- [Added] rule_id: unknown — Lookup Gen - Splunk Instance Inventory: New saved search to generate and maintain the splunk_expected_instances lookup; scheduled around 02:00 daily; builds inventory from local peers and existing data.
- [Modified] rule_id: OPS028 — Ops - License Master - Splunk License Expiration: Modified: drilldown messages refined and rule_version bumped from 1.0.2 to 1.0.3; improves guidance and keeps versioning in sync; no change to overall behavior.
- [Added] rule_id: OPS058 — Ops - Splunk - Splunk Instance Missing: New rule to detect missing or non-Up peers by comparing expected inventory with current peers; triggers an alert when missing or down; cron schedule every 5 minutes.

Other changes
- Added two new saved searches; updated OPS028 to version 1.0.3.

item.title: Splunk DB Connect - v4.2.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

See Release Notes for Splunk DB Connect.


Description:
Warning: You can't upgrade DB Connect directly from versions earlier than 3.18.0 to versions 4.0.0 or later. Make sure to follow upgrade path guide. Splunk DB Connect is a generic SQL database extension for Splunk that enables easy integration of database information with Splunk queries and reports. Splunk DB Connect supports DB2/Linux, Informix, MemSQL, MySQL, AWS Aurora, Microsoft SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, AWS RedShift, SAP SQL Anywhere, Sybase ASE, Sybase IQ, Teradata, InfluxDB and MongoDB Atlas & Standalone. Use Splunk DB Connect's Inputs to import structured data for powerful indexing, analysis, and visualization. Use Outputs to export machine data insights to a legacy database to increase your organization's insight. Use Lookups to add meaningful information to your event data by referencing fields in an external database. Use query commands to build live dashboards mixing structured and unstructured data.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: Atlas Splunk Assessment - v4.8.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Atlas Splunk Assessment v4.8.2

  • Atlas Splunk Assessment now correctly runs in Windows environments as expected.
  • Time range of executed assessments now reliably prints on the header bar.


Description:
The Atlas Splunk Assessment (v4) helps Splunk users proactively manage and optimize their environments. This automated tool evaluates your Splunk deployment, identifying potential issues and providing prioritized, actionable recommendations. It demonstrates how the Atlas platform can address areas highlighted in the assessment. Track your progress over time as you implement improvements using the recurring assessment feature. The tool is regularly updated on both Splunkbase and the Atlas platform—check back frequently for the latest version. For suggestions or feedback, contact us at support@kinneygroup.com. To learn more, please check out the full Atlas Splunk Assessment documentation site: https://docs.atlas.kinneygroup.com/docs/using-atlas/assessment
item.dc:creator: Presidio - Key Partner Acct

item.title: Rapid7 InsightVM Technology Add-On for Splunk - v1.5.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Compatibility updates


Description:
The Rapid7 InsightVM Technology Add-On is used for retrieving asset and vulnerability data from InsightVM and ingesting into Splunk following the Common Information Model (CIM). The add-on is designed to be compatible with Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud with the use of a Universal Forwarder. This Technology Add-On is intended to import asset and vulnerability findings from the InsightVM Platform without the use of the InsightVM console. The default configuration will import assets and vulnerabilities for devices that have been scanned since the last import run. Key functionality includes: - Import all asset and vulnerability data when it runs for the first time - Track previous import times to only import assets and their associated vulnerabilities that have been scanned in the time since the last import - Vulnerabilities that are newly found or have been remediated will be imported as new events in Splunk and respectively assigned a status of "new" or "remediated" - Previously imported vulnerabilities that have not changed in status will not be imported as new events and will retain their `found` status - An optional configuration that allows importing all data every run, or every X period of days. The Rapid7 InsightVM Dashboard and Technology Add-On are recommended in place of the Nexpose Dashboard and Technology Add-On listed on Splunkbase for all InsightVM customers. Support for the application is provided by Rapid7 Support via our Customer Support Portal at https://www.rapid7.com/for-customers/
item.dc:creator: Rapid7 Integrations

item.title: Datalake2SplunkV3 - v1.1.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Changed of 1.0.9 (removed)
- Changed Lookup Gen searches so they match exactly lookup mode + description at the end for ES
- removed Build Datalake credit card lookup
- changed 'email' for 'src_user' in "Build Datalake email lookup" as 'email' is not a value accepted by email_intel kvstore
- Build Datalake file lookup outputs a 'file_hash' column instead of just file
- Build Datalake ip_range lookup outputs an 'ip' column for ES ip_intel
- Build Datalake certificate lookup outputs a 'certificate_file_hash' column instead of juste file because datalake gives hashes and it's ES supported field name

Errors introduced by 1.0.9 corrected by 1.1.0
- Some backslash missing for Datalake certificate and Datalake URL generating lookup searches (no issues but changed).
- Errors at line 53,135,177,218,259,343,385,426 of savedsearches.conf in 'by' clause


Description:
This app provides the ability to ingest Orange Datalake threat intel given an api token. It replaces former app Datalake2Splunk (https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7589) as new version of the Datalake API required changes in the script.
item.dc:creator: Splunkapps Cybersoc OCD

item.title: Flashpoint Add-on for Splunk - v2.4.1 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Hotfix: Enforced a minimum interval of 3600 seconds and increased the API Poll Offset to 5400 seconds to handle the data caching mechanism for Indicator inputs.


Description:
Leveraging Flashpoint’s technical data and intelligence reports provides Splunk users with visibility into illicit online communities in order to correlate information related to their infrastructure, therefore, gaining insights in a timely manner and leveraging connections to prioritize their response. The Flashpoint Splunk Add-on enables Flashpoint data to be seamlessly integrated into customers’ Splunk instances in order to automatically alert customers when a match has been made between indicators from internal log data and Flashpoint intelligence. Integrated Flashpoint Datasets: Technical Indicators: Enables users access to indicators of compromise (IOCs) and technical data across Flashpoint datasets, including those found in Flashpoint Finished Intelligence Reports, allowing for seamless integration into users’ workflows and automated tools. Finished Intelligence: Access to analytical reports produced by our intelligence analysts. Reports cover a wide spectrum of illicit underground activity, including crimeware, fraud, emerging malware, violent extremism, and physical threats. Provides Flashpoint CVEs Dataset: CVEs: Access to the latest CVEs within Flashpoint collection, including access to MITRE and NVD data, as well as CVEs discussed by threat actors as observed by Flashpoint Intelligence Analysts. Key Features: - Captures, indexes, and correlates in real time Flashpoint technical data within Splunk’s searchable repository - Enables users to generate reports and visualizations, including graphs, alerts, and dashboards - Collect integrated data using Flashpoint’s REST-based API - Includes IOCs such as hashes, URLs, domains, as well as details related to malware families, mapping to the MITRE ATT&CK framework - Includes CVEs as well as DDW mentions and code that exploits them. - Enterprise Security integration About Flashpoint Flashpoint delivers converged intelligence and risk solutions to private and public sector organizations worldwide. As the global leader in Business Risk Intelligence (BRI), Flashpoint provides meaningful intelligence to assist organizations in combating threats and adversaries. Through sophisticated technology, advanced data collections, and human-powered analysis, Flashpoint is the only intelligence firm that can help multiple teams across an organization bolster cybersecurity, confront fraud, detect insider threats, enhance corporate and physical security, improve executive protection, address third-party risk, and support due diligence efforts. For more information, visit https://www.flashpoint-intel.com/ or follow us on Twitter at @FlashpointIntel.
item.dc:creator: Matt Howell

item.title: CVEFeed.io Vulnerability CVE Alerts - v1.0.1 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Supporting CVEFeed.io 2.1 release.


Description:
This add-on integrates with CVEFeed.io to automatically ingest vulnerability alerts (CVEs) into Splunk. It provides real-time visibility into product-specific security advisories, enabling security teams to monitor, search, and correlate CVE alerts alongside their existing data for faster threat detection and response.
item.dc:creator: CVFeedio Intel

item.title: Databricks Add-on for Splunk - v1.4.3 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Description:
The Databricks Add-on for Splunk allows Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud users to run queries and execute actions, such as running notebooks and jobs, in Databricks. Click the Details tab for Installation instructions and documentation. Features - Run Databricks SQL queries right from the Splunk search bar and see the results in Splunk UI - Execute actions in Databricks, such as notebook runs and jobs, from Splunk
item.dc:creator: Databricks Inc

item.title: Gigamon Deep Observability App - JSON - v2.3.2 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

This latest version has updated OT dashboard and AI App Insights


Description:
Gigamon Deep Observability App is for customers who wants to use precanned dashboards. The search queries are written based on the JSON feed from Gigamon Cloud Suite This app has the below list of use cases: 1. Security Posture Use cases to detect and remediate flaws in securing the applications in the network. This gives visibility into weak cipher, untrusted certificates, signature algorithms 2. Anomalous Traffic Detect and remediate challenges with DNS, HTTP, and HTTPS traffic in the network 3. Troubleshooting Detect and remediate network delay, connectivity, and protocol errors in the network. For ex server vs network latency, TCP Ip connectivity issues, DNS issues. 4. Suspicious Activities Detect and remediate issues related to unmanaged devices, suspicious connections, and traffic outside norms in the network. For ex: IOT unmanaged devices, unwanted services and port misuse 5. Rogue Activities Detect and remediate unsanctioned applications that can pose challenges to your network and security. Ex: Unsanctioned p2p Apps, crypto jacking. 6. M-21-31 Logging U.S. Office of Management and Budget M-21-31 logging requirements. AMI metadata can be used for HTTPS,HTTP, DNS, Shadow IT, IOMT protocol activity and OT monitoring, to meet the logging requirements 7. PCI Compliance Helps organizations validate their PCI compliance posture with specialised dashboards. 8. Operational Technology (OT) - Gain visibility into OT applications, traffic volume, and OT sessions. - Verify if networks support fully air-gapped OT systems and detect the presence of non-OT or IT applications, which may indicate retrofitted systems due to IT/OT convergence. 9. AI Insights - Overview of 43 AI application insights, highlighting the total number of AI flows along with key analytics such as top AI sources, destinations, and applications. - AI Traffic distribution, bandwidth, High volume helping identify which AI platforms and endpoints are most active in the monitored environment.
item.dc:creator: Gigamon Inc.

Sunburst visualization that is easy to use. Has tooltips and many configuration options such as optional breadcrumbs, label customisations and numerous color schemes. Sunburst charts are useful for displaying hierarchical data or the volume of traffic through a sequence of steps.

no changes. Just a version bump so that splunkbase does not archive app

A simple donut/pie chart that can be displayed as a semicircle and supports multiple series on a single chart. You can also use it as a gauge. It is built with the chart.js library. Colours can be explicitly set in the search query. Supports dark mode.

Platform: Splunk

no changes, just a version bump to stop splunkbase from archiving app

A simple digital or analog Clock visualization for your dashboards. Useful when your Splunk dashboards are on a big TV. Supports dark mode.

Platform: Splunk

no changes, just a version bump to stop splunkbase from archiving app

A world-map visualization showing where it is day and night in the world. This viz is ideal for companies that have follow the sun operations. Text, icons and clocks can be overlaid on the map.

item.title: Region Chart Viz - v1.1.12 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

no changes. just a version bump to stop Splunkbase from archiving app


Description:
A line chart visualization that supports data-driven, colored regions. Can be used to show: - configured thresholds - the spread of data (for example using standard deviation/interquartile range) - where data might be incomplete (because it is still arriving) - maintenance periods - business hours Provide valuable context to your line charts. Built with D3. See also "Get ITSI Thresholds" ( https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4910/ ) - a custom command to retrieve ITSI time-based thresholds.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Heat Grid Viz - v1.0.5 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

no changes. just a version bump so that the app wont be archived.


Description:
Configurable Heat Grid / Heatmap visualization that can be used to show the quick status or health of many items at once. Support for grouping, and can display as hexagons, squares, diamonds or circles. Fully customisable tooltips, drilldown support, and numerous color schemes. Works in dark-mode.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Financial Chart Viz - v1.0.3 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

no changes. version bump only so that the app won't be archived.


Description:
Configurable candlestick (OHLC) chart with volume data. Supports mouse pan/zoom, dynamic markers and dark mode. Uses the TradingView lightweight charting library. This viz is useful for displaying financial data such as stocks and equity prices. Note that this is just a visualization for displaying data you have in Splunk already, it does not retreive price quotes from the internet. Splunkbase has a few apps that can do this.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Browser Icon Changer - v1.0.4 [Version Update]

no changes. version bump so that app doesnt get archived.

When you have many tabs open, spread across to different Splunk environments (e.g. Prod vs non-Prod), this makes it easier to differentiate what each tab is for. You may also want to differentiate dedicated Splunk management instances (e.g. monitoring console or cluster master) from your main search head/s.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Dashboard Generator - v1.1.1 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Update dependencies.


Short Description:
This add-on delivers an alert action that generates dashboards from search results and optionally schedules their PDF (and PNG, for Dashboard Studio assets) delivery.


Description:
This add-on delivers an alert action that generates dashboards from search results and optionally schedules their PDF (and PNG, for Dashboard Studio assets) delivery. Starting from a dashboard template, the alert action generates a new dashboard for each result. If a scheduled view template is selected, PDF deliveries of the dashboards are scheduled. The add-on can delete dashboards created in the previous run of the saved search (not available for ad hoc searches) or based on their ID. When a dashboard is deleted, all associated scheduled views are also deleted.
item.dc:creator: Alessandro Serpi

item.title: Italian Geospatial Lookups for Splunk - v2.1.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Update lookups and SVG files to 2025-01-01 borders.


Description:
This Splunk app provides geospatial lookups and SVG maps for Italian regions and provinces. It also provides two supporting lookups to convert names between Italian and English and to retrieve ISO 3166-2 codes.
item.dc:creator: Alessandro Serpi

item.title: IPInfo App for Splunk - v9.5.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

  • Fix excessive bearer tokens creation
  • Add support for custom Certificate Authority


Description:
The IPinfo app provides an integration between IPinfo’s API & DB products and Splunk. This app adds the `ipinfo` command to Splunk, which uses IPinfo data via the API or DBs to lookup IP information for a given IP address. IPinfo offers the most accurate IP address data available anywhere. We prioritize accuracy for both paid and free plans, never downgrading data quality for any plan. With 10+ IP address datasets available, users can get all their IP address data in one place. - IP to Geolocation - Privacy Detection - Hosted Domains - IP to Company - ASN data - IP to Mobile - IP Ranges - IP Whois - Abuse Contact If you’d like to test IPinfo’s data, we also offer a 50,000 free IP to Geolocation API requests per month and a Free IP Database. To activate your free API requests, all you have to do is create an account, retrieve your token from the dashboard, and start using accurate IP data. For more requests and data types, IPinfo premium plans are designed with developers in mind. We update all our datasets every 24 hours (https://ipinfo.io/ip-data) to ensure the best accuracy for all plans. IPinfo also offers Enterprise plans with unique customizations and usage limits IPinfo’s users deliver reliable use cases, including: - Threat detection & intelligence - Critical infrastructure security - Fraud prevention - Security compliance & risk management - Utilities - And many more Learn more here: https://ipinfo.io/enterprise
item.dc:creator: IPinfo Support

item.title: VirusTotal v3 - v3.0.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: SOAR


Release Notes:

  • Update the semgrep hook in pre-commit to fix the build pipeline
  • Release this as 3.0.0 since it uses the new SOAR SDK


Description:
This app integrates with the VirusTotal cloud to implement investigative and reputation actions using v3 APIs
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: LCS Plug-In - v1.0.12 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

New Features

Region Selection
- Added a new region input parameter that allows users to select their Cisco BCS data region.
- Supported values: us (United States) and emea (Europe, Middle East & Africa).
- All API requests are now routed to the correct regional endpoint based on this selection.
- Previously the region was hardcoded to us.

Security Vulnerable Only Filter
- Added a new security_vulnerable_only input parameter (checkbox).
- When enabled, only devices with a matchConfidence of "Vulnerable" or "Potentially Vulnerable" are ingested for the following sourcetypes:
- cisco:bcs:securityadvisory
- cisco:bcs:fieldnotice
- Filtering is applied server-side via the Cisco BCS API, reducing unnecessary data transfer.
- Defaults to enabled.

Bug Fixes

Python Version Compatibility Fix
- Fixed a crash that prevented the add-on from loading on Python 3.7 and 3.8 environments.
- The get_jwt function was using a return type hint syntax (tuple[str, int]) introduced in Python 3.9, causing an immediate script failure on older Python versions before any data collection could begin.
- Updated to use Tuple[str, int] from the typing library, which is compatible with Python 3.7 through 3.12.

Notes

  • The security_vulnerable_only filter only applies to cisco:bcs:securityadvisory and cisco:bcs:fieldnotice. All other 29 data sources are unaffected by this setting.
  • No changes to existing sourcetypes, field names, or index behavior.


Short Description:
This app integrates Cisco Business Critical Services (BCS) operational data into Splunk, automating the collection of device inventory, configuration best practices, security advisories, and lifecycle alerts. It simplifies API authentication and rate limiting, enabling Cisco Advanced Services customers to monitor and analyze their network operations efficiently.


Description:
This Splunk add-on is designed to collect and ingest operational insights data from Cisco’s Business Critical Services (BCS) API into Splunk. It enables users to automatically fetch a wide range of detailed device, inventory, configuration, risk mitigation, and product alert information from Cisco’s API endpoints and index this data within Splunk for analysis and monitoring. The app addresses the challenge of integrating Cisco BCS operational data into Splunk by providing a modular input that handles authentication, API rate limiting, pagination, and event creation for multiple data sources. This allows customers—particularly those with Cisco Advanced Services—to gain centralized visibility into their Cisco device inventory, configuration best practices, security advisories, hardware and software lifecycle alerts, and other critical operational metrics without manual data collection. By automating the retrieval and indexing of this comprehensive Cisco operational data, the app helps organizations improve their network management, risk assessment, and compliance monitoring capabilities within the Splunk platform.
item.dc:creator: Israel Fernandez

item.title: HashiCorp Vault App for Splunk - v1.0.7 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Description:
Hashicorp Vault Enterprise users can take advantage of this Splunk® app to understand Vault from an operational and security perspective. The Splunk app includes powerful dashboards that split metrics into logical groupings targeting both operators and security teams. The app can be used with Splunk Enterprise as well as Splunk Cloud.
item.dc:creator: HashiCorp Vault

This application accompanies the Alerts for SplunkAdmins application on SplunkBase. This TA provides the lookup watcher modular input along with the streamfilter and streamfilterwildcard custom commands. These custom commands are used by a few searches within the Alerts for SplunkAdmins application Additionally this TA provides dashboards and custom commands for changing TTL values of savedsearches via the UI

The SonicWall SMA 1000 Technical Add-on for Splunk allows a Splunk Enterprise administrator to ingest and interpret usage and performance data from SMA 1000 appliances by translating data into CIM models for simplified integration and reporting.
item.dc:creator: SonicWall Inc

item.title: Automox Technology Add-On for Splunk - v1.5.5 [Version Update]

Fixed Mako template 500 error on add-on page load in 1.5.4


Description:
The Automox Technology Add-On connects Splunk to the Automox platform in order to facilitate the pulling of data related to patch, endpoint, and events of Automox managed endpoints into Splunk.
item.dc:creator: Automox Inc

item.title: Compliance Posture for Splunk - v1.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Initial release. CIS-CAT Pro ARF XML import with browser-based upload, four compliance dashboards (CIS Benchmark Overview, Executive Summary, Remediation Report, Upload History), and compliance scoring with trend tracking.


Short Description:
Free CIS Benchmark compliance tracking for Splunk. Upload scan results from your browser. See your compliance posture in minutes. No forwarders. No TAs. No infrastructure required.


Description:
CIS Benchmark compliance reporting shouldn't require a paid dashboard platform, a dedicated ingestion pipeline, or weeks of integration work. I built this app because I believe compliance visibility shouldn't be gated behind expensive platforms or complex integrations. Whether you're a small team without budget for commercial tooling or a large organization looking for a lightweight alternative, you deserve a solution that works out of the box. My goal is to help as many teams as possible by providing a free, production-ready app that solves a real gap in the Splunk ecosystem. Compliance Posture for Splunk is a free, self-contained Splunk application that gives you consolidated CIS Benchmark compliance visibility across your entire infrastructure — from install to dashboards in minutes. Upload your CIS-CAT Pro Assessor ARF XML scan results directly through the browser using drag-and-drop. No file shares. No scripted inputs. No forwarder configuration. Just install the app, upload your scan files, and see where you stand. Built by a Splunk Enterprise Architect with 10+ years of hands-on experience implementing compliance reporting solutions across commercial and federal environments.
item.dc:creator: Marcus House

item.title: TrackUC - v0.1.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Short Description:
TrackUC or Track use-cases is a splunk app to track and manage use-case lifecycle (creation, modification and approval) for security solutions.


Description:
TrackUC or Track use-cases is a splunk app to track and manage use-case lifecycle (creation, modification and approval) for security solutions. it provides a case management similar to splunk enterprise security ES. the app also: - supports search head clustering (SHC) - Has friendly UI similar to splunk ES - Protects approved tickets/requests from modifications - Provides a dashboard to track SLAs and provide overview of created tickets/requests * restarting the Search Head is required after installation * only users with the role "trackuc_approval" can approve tickets/requests
item.dc:creator: adnan alshammary

APIVoid v2 connector for Splunk SOAR using the SDK
item.dc:creator: srv-prod-splnkb-papp

item.title: Dark Web Scan by Bechtle App - v1.0.1 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Initial release


Short Description:
See if your company's data was leaked to the dark web with this app for the Dark Web Scan by Bechtle.


Description:
See if your company's data was leaked to the dark web with this app for the Dark Web Scan by Bechtle. Credentials of your employees, customers, suppliers and service technicians get stolen by cybercriminals and are sold on the dark web. Get notified about any new offers or leaks regarding your company using this app. - We permanently look out for new forums, marketplaces or chat groups and get access. - Then we crawl data from these sources on the digital underground and save it to our database. - You get notified if there's something about your company being sold. Using the custom Splunk search commands, you can even customize your automations. For example, you could set up your own automation to send an email to users with leaked credentials or reset their passwords automatically. (The automation requires additional setup and is not part of the app.) Additionally, the Dark Web Scan by Bechtle also allows you to search for common misconfigurations or other risks that could lead to security incidents in the future, e.g. email security settings, the security of your website against common cyberattacks or OSINT info like publicly discoverable email addresses or subdomains.
item.dc:creator: Bechtle Darkwebscan Team

item.title: STIG Compliance App for Splunk - v1.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Initial release of STIG Compliance App for Splunk.

Features:
- Browser-based drag-and-drop upload for DISA STIG checklists (.ckl and .cklb formats)
- Custom Python parser with automatic format detection
- Four compliance dashboards: Compliance Overview, Executive Summary, POA&M Report, Upload History
- Risk scoring by CAT I/II/III severity
- Deduplication logic (latest checklist per host/STIG only)
- Historical upload tracking with compliance trend visualization
- Pre-built saved searches with alerting capability


Short Description:
Free STIG compliance tracking and reporting. Drag-and-drop CKL/CKLB upload, instant dashboards, zero infrastructure required.


Description:
Managing STIG compliance shouldn't require expensive vendor platforms, complex infrastructure, or weeks of deployment. I built this app because I believe every organization — regardless of size or budget — deserves access to effective compliance tools. My goal is to help as many people and organizations as possible by providing a free, production-ready resource that solves a real problem. STIG Compliance App for Splunk imports DISA STIG checklists and transforms them into searchable, reportable compliance data — with zero external dependencies and zero infrastructure beyond your existing Splunk deployment. Upload .ckl and .cklb checklist files directly through your browser. The app parses, indexes, and visualizes your compliance posture in minutes — not days. KEY FEATURES - Browser-based drag-and-drop upload for .ckl and .cklb files — no forwarders, no file shares, no scripted inputs - Custom CKL/CKLB parser converts DISA STIG XML checklists into searchable Splunk events - Four compliance dashboards: Compliance Overview, Executive Summary, POA&M Report, and Upload History - Risk scoring by severity: (CAT I x 10) + (CAT II x 5) + (CAT III x 1) - Deduplication logic displays only the latest checklist per host/STIG combination - Historical upload tracking with timestamps for audit trail - Pre-built saved searches and alert templates for CAT I findings and compliance thresholds - Works on a single search head or in a clustered environment — fully self-contained WHY THIS APP EXISTS Most STIG compliance workflows today involve Excel spreadsheets, manual tracking, or paid platforms that require additional licensing and infrastructure. This app eliminates those barriers. Install one app, upload through your browser, and get compliance dashboards immediately.
item.dc:creator: Marcus House

item.title: Salesforce Commerce Cloud Connector for CX Monitoring - v6.9.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Short Description:
The Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) Connector is part of a comprehensive CX Monitoring solution, offering 360° monitoring with self-healing and 110+ rt alerts. It performs millions of real-time checks across logs, orders, products, pricebooks, inventory, eCDN, and customer data. Gain visibility into 200+ KPIs to detect CX issues, optimize operations, and prevent revenue loss.


Description:
Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) Connector empowers businesses with powerful tools to monitor and optimize the CX journey. The solution features 360-degree data ingestion self-monitoring with robust autohealing mechanisms, ensuring high reliability and operational efficiency. This is a fully automated system equipped with 110+ SFCC alerts based on real-life use cases that address potential issues leading to significant revenue loss. These alerts perform millions of near real-time checks across all included data sources, ensuring comprehensive monitoring and swift detection of anomalies. This solution offers seamless integration, providing data inputs to ingest logs, order events, products, pricebook, inventory, eCDN logs, customer registrations, logins, and audit tracking. It enables visibility through dashboards and alerts based on 200+ crucial business KPIs, ensuring your business stays proactive in handling CX complexities. Tools Provided to detect and troubleshoot a wide range of critical issues, including: - Third-Party Integrations - monitor integration failures and outages. - Checkout Issues - identify bottlenecks and interruptions within the checkout process. - Anti-Fraud Integrations - detect anomalies in fraud prevention systems. - Payment Integrations - monitor payment system availability and performance. - Orders Velocity - analyze and respond to order processing fluctuations. - Order Flow Anomaly Detection - identify irregularities in the order lifecycle. - Jobs Performance - track and optimize scheduled job execution. - Product Data Flows - ensure seamless catalog imports, inventory updates, and pricebook synchronization. - eCDN Velocity and Availability - monitor eCDN performance and ensure uninterrupted service. - Release and Replication Errors - detect and resolve issues arising during deployments or data replications. Please note that usage of this connector requires an additional dashboard app and license to operate fully. Contact us at : sales@aiopsgroup.com or visit our page : https://www.valantic.com/en/cx/services/cx-monitoring/
item.dc:creator: AIOPS Group Monitoring Team

item.title: alphaMountain - web threat risk and categorization - v2.0.1 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Description:
Add web reputation to your threat research by pivoting from domain/host/IP/URL to see the threat risk and categorization from alphaMountain's threatYeti app.

item.title: Userful Infinity - v0.1.3-beta [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Short Description:
The Userful Infinity app provides a secure, enterprise-grade bridge between Splunk’s data visualization capabilities and the Userful Infinity operational platform. It enables organizations to project real-time Splunk dashboards onto mission-critical video walls and distributed displays without the security risks of exposed credentials or manual login prompts.


Description:
The Userful Infinity app provides a secure, enterprise-grade bridge between Splunk’s data visualization capabilities and the Userful Infinity operational platform. It enables organizations to project real-time Splunk dashboards onto mission-critical video walls and distributed displays without the security risks of exposed credentials or manual login prompts. It provides a secure gateway that enables seamless dashboard embedding into the Userful Infinity platform using SSO header injection and IP-based security.
item.dc:creator: Rubesh kumar

This Add-on allows users to pull data from the Webex REST API to Splunk.
